item.title: Yes, we can fix a pack funding and that would make the party as a whole better, but we must face what is in front of us and that...
item.description:
Yes, we can fix a pack funding and that would make the party as a whole better, but we must face what is in front of us and that is not just a party with problems it is a problem party#greenscreenvideo

item.title: do you not cringe even a little bit when saying shit like this?
item.description:
do you not cringe even a little bit when saying shit like this? Like does it not cross your mind that you look silly?
